title: salacia macrophylla
intro: Salacia macrophylla, also known as Bitter Chai or Bitter Oleander, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Salacia macrophylla include its potential to aid in weight management, improve insulin sensitivity, and lower cholesterol levels. Salacia macrophylla is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
